title: 5 Stocks That Just Increased Their Dividends
text: Of late, Wells Fargo (WFC), Matador Resources (MTDR), Cintas (CTAS), Truist Financial (TFC) and MSCI (MSCI) have increased their dividend payments.

title: Truist increases prime rate to 5.50 percent
text: CHARLOTTE, N.C. , July 27, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Truist Financial Corporation (NYSE: TFC) announced an increase in its prime lending rate to 5.50 percent from 4.75 percent, effective tomorrow, July 28, 2022.

title: Truist continues to deliver on rural investment, lending and services commitments
text: Ongoing rural initiatives a critical component of Truist's $60 billion Community Benefits Plan CHARLOTTE, N.C. , July 27, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Truist Financial Corporation (NYSE: TFC) today shared key progress updates for its long-term rural development strategy.

title: Truist declares common and preferred stock dividends
text: CHARLOTTE, N.C., July 26, 2022 /PRNewswire/ — The Board of Directors of Truist Financial Corporation (NYSE: TFC) declared a regular quarterly cash dividend of $0.52 per common share, payable on Sept. 1, 2022, to shareholders of record at the close of business on Aug. 12, 2022. The Board also declared regular cash dividends on the […]...

title: Truist names Dominica Groom Williams head of DEI
text: Industry veteran tapped to lead bank-wide strategic inclusion and diversity initiatives CHARLOTTE, N.C. , July 25, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Truist Financial Corporation (NYSE: TFC) today announced that Dominica Groom Williams will join the company as head of diversity, equity and inclusion (DEI), effective today.

text: TipRanks analyst ranking service pinpoints Wall Street's best-performing stocks, including Marvell and Bank of America.

title: Truist (TFC) Q2 Earnings Beat Estimates as Loans & Rates Rise
text: Rise in average loan balance, higher interest rates and increase in insurance income support Truist Financial's (TFC) Q2 earnings.

title: Truist Financial Corporation (TFC) CEO Bill Rogers on Q2 2022 Results - Earnings Call Transcript
text: Truist Financial Corporation (NYSE:TFC ) Q2 2022 Earnings Conference Call July 19, 2022 8:00 AM ET Company Participants Ankur Vyas - Head of Investor Relations Bill Rogers - Chief Executive Officer Daryl Bible - Chief Financial Officer Clarke Starnes - Chief Risk Officer Beau Cummins - Vice Chair Conference Call Participants Betsy Graseck - Morgan Stanley Ken Usdin - Jefferies Gerard Cassidy - RBC Matt O'Connor - Deutsche Bank Mike Mayo - Wells Fargo Securities Erika Najarian - UBS John Pancari - Evercore ISI Operator Greetings, ladies and gentlemen, and welcome to the Truist Financial Corporation's Second Quarter 2022 Earnings Conference Call. Currently, all participants are in a listen-only mode.

title: Truist Financial Corporation (TFC) Q2 Earnings and Revenues Surpass Estimates
text: Truist Financial Corporation (TFC) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 2.56% and 0.32%, respectively, for the quarter ended June 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: Truist reports second quarter 2022 results
text: Second quarter 2022 GAAP earnings of $1.5 billion, or $1.09 per diluted share Second quarter 2022 Adjusted earnings of $1.6 billion, or $1.20 per diluted share Results reflect strong loan growth and expanded NIM given higher rates and strong deposit franchise Fee revenues include record insurance and card and payment related fees, tempered by market volatility Capital, liquidity, and credit quality remain strengths CHARLOTTE, N.C. , July 19, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Truist Financial Corporation (NYSE: TFC) today reported earnings for the second quarter of 2022.

title: Truist Debuts Digital Consumer Accounts With No Overdraft Fees
text: Truist Financial on Monday (July 18) rolled out two accessible account options that will extend banking services to new customers while avoiding overdraft fees, a press release said. Called Truist One Banking, the two new accounts will help clients “build a stronger financial future,” according to the company.

title: Is Truist Financial Stock A Buy After Dividend Hike Announcement?
text: We examine TFC's dividend qualities, particularly in light of the recent stress test results. We touch upon some of the key narratives ahead of the Q2 results which are due to be announced on the 18th.

title: Truist launches new accounts with no overdraft fees
text: Purpose-driven approach addresses clients' biggest challenges and creates more pathways to financial inclusion CHARLOTTE, N.C. , July 18, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Truist Financial Corporation (NYSE: TFC) today announced the launch of Truist One Banking—two new accounts that empower clients to take more control of their banking needs and avoid overdraft fees.

title: Earnings Previews: Halliburton, IBM, Johnson & Johnson, Lockheed Martin, Truist
text: The three major U.S. equity indexes closed mixed on Thursday. The Dow Jones industrials lost 0.5%, the S&P 500 dropped 0.3% and the Nasdaq added 0.03%.

title: Truist Foundation announces $1.25 million grant to Nashville Business Incubation Center
text: Grant provides wraparound support services for local women entrepreneurs through tools, training, mentorships and results-driven curriculum NASHVILLE, Tenn. , July 14, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Truist Foundation today announced a $1.25 million commitment to the Nashville Business Incubation Center (NBIC), a nonprofit focused on cultivating the growth and development of local women-, racially and ethnically diverse-, and veteran-owned small businesses.

title: 5 Large-Cap Stocks Likely to Gain on Q2 Earnings Next Week
text: Five large-cap companies will report second-quarter 2022 earnings results next week. These are: SYF, JNJ, JBHT, TFC and CFG.

title: Can Truist Financial Corporation (TFC) Keep the Earnings Surprise Streak Alive?
text: Truist Financial Corporation (TFC) has an impressive earnings surprise history and currently possesses the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely beat in its next quarterly report.

title: Truist to boost minimum wage to $22 an hour
text: Truist Financial Corp said Wednesday it will raise its U.S. minimum wage to $22 an hour, effective Oct. 1. The financial services company's previous minimum hourly wage was $15 to $18, based on geography.

title: Truist boosts minimum wage to $22
text: New hourly wage among highest in industry to attract and retain top talent CHARLOTTE, N.C. , July 6, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Truist Financial Corporation (NYSE: TFC) today announced it will boost its minimum U.S. hourly pay rate to $22 effective Oct. 1 of this year.
